D12 PsychologyL2 UnderstandReference

Packaging Shelf Impact — Category-Standout Colour

Shelf-level eye-tracking shows ~3s per category before consumers move on; colour standing out from category convention captures the largest share of attention

Coffee shelves are dominated by browns and reds; a new brand in turquoise gets disproportionate first-fixation attention. Method 2-2-2 (Pieters 2010): 2 seconds, 2 fixations, 2 categories. Brand standout is the #1 design lever for new packaging.

Slide your brand colour; first-fixation share approximates inverse-distance to category mean.
